scripts.openapi:generate:ts-client: rm -rf gen/ts/http/ts-client && mkdir -p gen/ts/http/ts-client/models gen/ts/http/ts-client/apis && openapi-generator-cli generate --generator-key ts-client
scripts.openapi:generate:swagger-json: openapi-generator-cli generate --generator-key swagger-json && npm run openapi:copy:apidoc
scripts.openapi:generate: openapi-generator-cli generate --generator-key go-gin-server swagger-json && npm run openapi:copy:apidoc && npm run openapi:generate:ts-client && npm run openapi:copy:web-client && npm run openapi:fmt:go
